prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津综合类最低录取位次分别为约4516→4459→5290→5144→5080名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2023年因选科调整出现明显后移（5290名），近两年稳定在 5080–5144名区间，2025年基准约5080名；该校在天津综合类招生计划2021年24人、2022年22人、2023年23人、2024年28人、2025年28人；2026年计 划22人，较2025年缩招约21.4%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名第22名（2021–2026年稳定），属顶尖高校层 次，对考生吸引力强；山东大学（威海）共享山东大学声誉；山东大学2026年声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及2019年学伴事件遗留影响），但威海校区相对独立， 影响有限；抖音热度排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；山东大学A+学科：数学；A学科：中国语言文学、外国语言文学、控制科学与工程 、马克思主义理论；A-学科：法学、物理学、应用经济学、工商管理、材料科学与工程、软件工程等；威海校区开设的数学类（A+）、法学类（A-）、电子信息类（关联计算机A- ）等均为优势学科，对相关专业报考有正向拉动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、数学/统计（推荐）等专业社会热度持续偏高，与威 海校区招生专业高度匹配；天津2026年考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增加约14%），竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年计划缩招21.4%（使位次前移）、天津考生总数增加约14%（使竞争加剧）以及学校高层次的持续吸引力，缩招效应略 强于考生增加效应，但声誉偏负面有一定抑制；在2025年基准5080名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约4457名，区间3957–4957名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学类（法学）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 电子信息类（智能工程新工科实验班，含计算机科学与技术、电子科学与技术、机器人工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（物理学）
- 海洋科学类（海洋科学、海洋资源开发技术）
- 经济学类（金融学（数智金融方向）、金融学（保险科技方向）、国际经济与贸易（数字贸易方向））
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学、新闻学（融媒体传播方向））
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4457名，区间3957–4957名。位次在区间中上段（约4200名以内）可重点冲刺一档的法学类、数学类、电子信息类等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约4200–4700名）建 议以二档的物理学类、海洋科学类、经济学类为主，兼冲一档；位次在区间下段（约4700名以外）建议以三档的中国语言文学类保底，同时争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 4516 → 4459 → 5290 → 5144 → 5080, showing a fluctuating and then backward trend; in 2023, due to subject selection adjustments, there was a significant backward shift (5290), stabilizing in the 5080–5144 range in recent two years, with a 2025 baseline of about 5080; the enrollment plan for Tianjin Comprehensive category was 24 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a reduction of about 21.4% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 22nd in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese universities (stable from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top-tier university level, with strong attraction to candidates; Shandong University (Weihai) shares the reputation of Shandong University; Shandong University's 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 study partner incident), but the Weihai campus is relatively independent, with limited impact; Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and high application attention; Shandong University's A+ disciplines: Mathematics; A disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, Control Science and Engineering, Marxist Theory; A- disciplines: Law, Physics, Applied Economics, Business Administration, Materials Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, etc.; the Weihai campus offers Mathematics (A+), Law (A-), Electronic Information (related to Computer A-), etc., all advantageous disciplines, positively driving applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (high heat recommended), Computer (recommended), Mathematics/Statistics (recommended) and other majors continue to have high social popularity, highly matching the enrollment majors of the Weihai campus; the total number of candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 plan reduction of 21.4% (causing ranking to move forward), the increase in Tianjin candidate total by about 14% (intensifying competition), and the sustained high-level attraction of the university, the reduction effect is slightly stronger than the candidate increase effect, but the slightly negative reputation has some suppression; based on the 2025 baseline of 5080, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 4457, with a range of 3957–4957.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (Law)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class, including Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (Physics)
- Marine Science (Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology)
- Economics (Finance (Digital Finance Direction), Finance (Insurance Technology Direction), International Economics and Trade (Digital Trade Direction))
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism (Convergence Media Communication Direction))
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 4457, range 3957–4957. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 4200) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Law, Mathematics, Electronic Information, etc.; candidates in the middle part (about 4200–4700) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Physics, Marine Science, Economics, while also sprinting for Tier 1; candidates in the lower part (outside about 4700) are advised to use Tier 3 Chinese Language and Literature as a safety, while also striving for Tier 2 majors.
